item.text: I’ll use the email tools only for this thread, then pull the customer/account and policy context needed before taking an action.
The thread is a VIP outage complaint with a manager request and a credit/refund question. I’m checking the CRM record and the relevant support policies before choosing between draft and escalation.

item.text: The broad policy searches did not return a match, so I’m narrowing the KB lookup to the required policy terms and checking the account record for any company-specific context.

The policy calls for escalation before promising any credit or refund because this is a VIP complaint with repeated service failures and renewal risk. I’m creating the escalation note with the required customer tier, company, summary, and requested outcome.

arguments.reason: VIP customer Priya Raman at Northstar Clinics reports an export outage that blocked a morning executive report, says this is the third issue this quarter, requests manager involvement today, and asks what credit or refund will be offered before renewal. Policy requires escalation of VIP complaints before promising credits, refunds, or contractual remedies; VIP store credit requires manager approval.

item.text:
